title: Chapter 1811: Immortal Monarch’s Supreme Seal(2)
content:
Shortly after the match ended, Hong Ling entered the arena and said to Lan Yingying, "Honestly, I didn’t expect you to win this match."

"I wouldn’t have won without my Young Master’s assistance," she said.

Hong Ling’s eyes shifted to Yuan, her gaze filled with interest, even showing a hint of envy and longing.

"I’m afraid to ask, but I won’t be able to sleep if I don’t. What kind of technique did you use at the end? Of course, you can refuse to answer."

Yuan smiled faintly behind his mask and replied, "It’s a secret technique that has been passed down through generations in my family."

"A family technique, huh? In that case, I won’t inquire further," Hong Ling said with a faint hint of disappointment in her voice. Though curious, she knew her boundaries.

"Anyway, before you leave, the Sect Leader said that he will be announcing the Hidden Domain’s opening in three days," she continued a moment later.

"Okay."

Sometime later, Yuan and the others returned to their living quarters.

"Young Master! What happened during the match?! What did you do to Yingying?!" Feng Yuxiang questioned the moment they returned. "I have never seen or heard of anything like that before!"

"That was just some of the Immortal Monarch’s techniques. I gave Yingying the Immortal Monarch’s Supreme Seal, making her one of the Divine Supremes. In exchange for her loyalty, she will be able to use some of my strength as if it were her own."

"What?! One of the Divine Supremes?! What about me?! I was your first servant—excluding Xiao Hua since she is human!" Feng Yuxiang was on the verge of tears after realizing Lan Yingying had become his first Divine Supreme despite appearing after her.

"I’ve only remembered this technique recently, so there’s no way I could’ve given it to you. Moreover, to accept the Supreme Seal is to offer your life to me. If I wish for your life, I could take it with a single thought. It’s not something I can casually hand out."

"I accept! Even if I have to offer my soul to you, please grant me your Supreme Seal and make me one of your Divine Supremes, Young Master!" Feng Yuxiang exclaimed passionately, her voice trembling with desperation.

Her tone was so fervent that it resembled that of a beggar pleading—no, perhaps even a beggar wouldn’t sound as utterly desperate as she did at that moment, her pride cast aside entirely.

Seeing how desperate Feng Yuxiang was, Yuan had no choice but to agree. Of course, he would’ve still given Feng Yuxiang the Supreme Seal even if she didn’t beg him to do so.

"Here."

Yuan created another Supreme Seal and offered it to Feng Yuxiang, who accepted it with open arms.

"Ah~! So this is the Young Master’s power! It’s flowing throughout my body!" Feng Yuxiang exclaimed, her voice quivering with delight. "With this seal, I will always feel connected to you, as if you are with me even when we are apart!"

She trembled with joy, savoring the profound sensation coursing through her.

Xi Meili swallowed nervously after seeing Feng Yuxiang’s reaction. She shifted her gaze to Yuan, seemingly contemplating whether she should also ask for one. However, after some pondering, she decided to wait a little longer.

<Feng Yuxiang’s status has been updated>

[Name: Feng Yuxiang]

[Servant Grade: Divine] -> [Servant Grade: Mythic]

[Master: Yuan]

[Cultivation: Ninth Level Divine Warrior]

[Legacy: None]

[Bloodline: Ancient Phoenix Bloodline] -> [Bloodline: Primordial Phoenix Bloodline]

[Physique: Inextinguisable Immortal Fire]

In the last two months, Feng Yuxiang’s cultivation increased even further, reaching the peak of Divine Warrior.

After accepting Yuan’s Supreme Seal, the words "Immortal Monarch" manifested near Feng Yuxiang’s chest in the form of a symbol directly over her heart. For Lan Yingying, once she reverted to her human form, the symbol appeared on her stomach, slightly below her belly button.

The markings were subtle, barely visible under normal circumstances. However, they’d quickly become prominent when they channeled the powers bestowed by the seal.

"What was that energy just now?"

Shortly after Feng Yuxiang accepted the Supreme Seal, Yingzi appeared out of thin air and asked.

Yuan explained the Supreme Seal to her.

"I see. How interesting."

Yuan smiled and said, "I also see that you’ve successfully cultivated the cultivation technique."

In two short months, Yingzi successfully cultivated Shadow Extraction and created a Dantian, which allowed her to cultivate spiritual energy.

"Yes, I managed to create my Dantian yesterday," she nodded.

"What? Yesterday? But you’re already at the peak of Spirit Lord!" Xi Meili exclaimed in a shocked tone.

"Such ridiculous progress is even faster than the Young Master… Of course, she has an advantage since she started cultivating in the Sixth Heaven, where the spiritual energy is much more powerful…" Feng Yuxiang muttered with a dumbfounded look on her face.

"Cultivating spiritual energy is much easier than cultivating Chaotic Essence," Yingzi said calmly. "It’s so much purer, which makes it significantly easier to absorb and refine. If cultivating was this easy in the Primal Expanse, I would’ve long reached Chaotic Immortal."

To reach Chaotic Immortal was akin to achieving at least Golden Immortal in the Nine Heavens. As for Yingzi, she was currently around Immortal Ascension with her Chaotic Heart.

"I guess we won’t have to worry about your sustainability in the Nine Heavens anymore." Yuan chuckled.

"By the way, Young Master, does the Supreme Seals negatively affect you in any way?" Feng Yuxiang asked a moment later.

"You’re asking that after you accepted it?" Yuan joked. "Yes, it does. Since I automatically share some of the spiritual energy I absorb with the Divine Supremes, I will naturally cultivate slower."

"H-how much slower?" she swallowed nervously.

"I don’t know, but we can test it out."

Yuan retrieved a Divine Sovereign-level monster core he’d acquired from the Vanishing Valley and casually tossed it into his mouth.

After consuming the monster core, Yuan could feel his cultivation increase slightly. Feng Yuxiang felt a refreshing sensation, but her cultivation did not change in the slightest.

As for Lan Yingying, her cultivation soared all the way to the fourth level of Divine Warrior in the blink of an eye.
